settings.title: Join Our Free Spring Planning Clinic
settings.excerpt: A ninety-minute online session to help local owners set realistic goals for the back half of the year.
settings.body:
The middle of the year is a good moment to stop and check whether your plans still match reality. To help with that, Clearpath is hosting a free planning clinic on the morning of 12 May.

It runs for ninety minutes online and is built for owners of small, independent businesses. We will walk through a simple framework for reviewing the first half of your year and resetting goals for the second.

What we will cover

The framework is deliberately plain. We start by looking honestly at what you set out to do in January and what actually happened. Then we sort the goals that still matter from the ones the year has quietly made irrelevant, and we set a short list of priorities for the months ahead.

On the morning itself we will walk through three steps together.

  • A quick, honest review of the first half of the year
  • Deciding which goals still deserve your attention
  • Setting a few clear priorities for the second half

How to get the most from it

Spaces are limited to twenty so the questions stay personal. Bring one challenge you are stuck on and we will work through a few of them live.

It helps to come with a rough sense of your own numbers, even on the back of an envelope. The owners who get the most out of these sessions are the ones willing to say out loud what is not working. You will not be the only one, and that honesty is usually where the useful answers start.
